channel.title: Call Recorder Updates
channel.description: Appcast feed for Call Recorder automatic updates.

item.title: Call Recorder 0.6.1
item.description:
Call Recorder 0.6.1

File and folder names are now always in English, even on Hebrew calls:

  • Names are transliterated to Latin script (e.g. יובל becomes Yuval).
  • Subjects are translated to English.

item.title: Call Recorder 0.6.0
item.description:
Call Recorder 0.6.0

Local, on-device transcription:

  • New engine picker with one-click download (Apple Speech, ivrit.ai for Hebrew, WhisperKit) - transcribe without the cloud or an API key.
  • On-device translation option (no key needed) for supported languages.
  • Automatic speaker names: clear two-party calls are labelled with your name vs the other party.
  • The recording menu now shows the file currently being transcribed.
  • Each engine can have a primary + fallback.
  • The in-call pill can now be placed over the menu bar (defaults to centered, top).
  • Taller Preferences window; clearer 'model version' wording.

item.title: Call Recorder 0.5.5
item.description:
Call Recorder 0.5.5

New features and improvements:

  • Auto-rename recordings: After transcription, recordings are now renamed to include who you spoke with and what the call was about. Format: yyyy.MM.dd@HH.mm Company - Person - Subject. Configurable in Preferences > Transcription.
  • Permission setup is more reliable: microphone, screen-recording-needs-restart, and notification recovery now guide you correctly.

item.title: Call Recorder 0.5.4
item.description:
Call Recorder 0.5.4

Performance and stability improvements:

  • Performance: processing after long calls now uses a fraction of the memory it used to.
  • Stability: fixed small resource leaks and tightened recording finalisation; large internal cleanup.
  • Cancelled recordings now reliably land in the Discarded folder, including when cancelled right at the start.
  • The pill's cancel button is now labelled "Cancel & discard" to match the safer behaviour (recordings go to the Discarded folder, not deleted).

item.title: Call Recorder 0.5.3
item.description:
Call Recorder 0.5.3

Improvements and fixes:

  • In-call pill timer now matches the menu-bar timer exactly.
  • Recordings are now organised into Year / Date folders.
  • Changing the recordings folder now asks whether to move your existing recordings to the new location.
  • Fixed: a call answered on the Mac (including switching to AirPods mid-call) is no longer wrongly discarded as "answered on your phone".
  • Discarded recordings are now moved to a "Discarded" folder instead of deleted, and are auto-removed after a configurable period (default 30 days).

item.title: Call Recorder 0.5.2
item.description:
Call Recorder 0.5.2

Bug fixes:

  • Voice recognition (speaker naming) now works reliably - fixes a sample-rate bug that corrupted enrolled voiceprints. If you enrolled a voice on an earlier version, please delete it and re-enrol (Preferences > Voices).
  • Pre-call echo removed: the brief echo at the very start of a recording (the calling app's self-monitor/sidetone before the call connects) is now suppressed. In-call audio is unchanged.

item.title: Call Recorder 0.5.1
item.description:
Call Recorder 0.5.1

Improvements:

  • Redesigned Preferences with a modern macOS System Settings look: colored sidebar icons, grouped cards, cleaner layout across every tab
  • In-call spectrum visualiser retuned so normal speech animates the middle of the bars (not bunched in the bass)

item.title: Call Recorder 0.5.0
item.description:
Call Recorder 0.5.0

Major feature release:

  • Wideband audio: recordings now capture at 32kHz HE-AAC for noticeably crisper, clearer voices (especially the remote party), at about the same file size
  • New floating in-call pill with pause, stop & save, and cancel controls, plus a live audio spectrum
  • Gapless pause/resume (also from the menu)
  • Voice-print enrolment: enrol people's voices in Preferences > Voices so transcripts name speakers instead of "Speaker 1/2"
  • Auto-discards a recording when a call is answered on your iPhone instead of the Mac
  • Interface refresh and Preferences fixes (sidebar, version display)

item.title: Call Recorder 0.4.5
item.description:
Call Recorder 0.4.5

Audio mixing adjustment:

  • SOFT-DUCK ducking depth adjusted to -9 dB to keep the local voice louder during mis-assigned segments

item.title: Call Recorder 0.4.4
item.description:
Call Recorder 0.4.4

Transcription and UI improvements:

  • Diarization with Speaker 1/2/3 labelling
  • Capture-failure notifications
  • Modern UI with auto-detect toggle
  • Version display fix
  • SOFT-DUCK -15dB audio ducking during calls

item.title: Call Recorder 0.3.0
item.description:
Call Recorder 0.3.0

Quality and organization improvements:

  • Per-day date folders for recordings
  • Consistent output volume normalization

item.title: Call Recorder 0.2.0
item.description:
Call Recorder 0.2.0

Major update with onboarding wizard and improvements:

  • First-run setup wizard for easy configuration
  • Fixes call-handoff split recordings
  • Multi-provider transcription support
  • UI refresh

item.title: Call Recorder 0.1.0
item.description:
Call Recorder 0.1.0

Initial release with full call recording functionality:

  • Two-track recording (microphone + system audio)
  • Automatic call detection
  • Menu bar interface with recording controls
  • Sparkle auto-update support
